_provenance.note: from_fastapi (OLD, P3<3.5) produced BUGGY tool names due to the mcp_custom_names bug: 'check_rsid_availability' leaked and 'lookup_rsid_availability' was missing. The explicit facade fixed this. v2.0.0 then adopted the GeneFoundry Tool-Naming Standard v1, renaming 'lookup_rsid_availability' -> 'resolve_rsid' ('lookup' is a banned verb synonym). tool_names below is the CURRENT target the parity guard pins.
